issues.description: The Time Traveller's dramatic physical transformation and injury lacks sufficient reaction from the Medical Man, who as a doctor should be more concerned about examining his wounds.
issues.original_text: His face was ghastly pale; his chin had a brown cut on it—a cut half-healed; his expression was haggard and drawn, as by intense suffering.
issues.suggestion: Have the Medical Man show more professional concern about the Time Traveller's injuries and physical condition, perhaps insisting on examining him.

issues.description: The opening philosophical reflection about the Time Traveller's character, while well-written, slows the momentum built up from previous chapters.
issues.original_text: I think that at that time none of us quite believed in the Time Machine. The fact is, the Time Traveller was one of those men who are too clever to be believed...
issues.suggestion: Consider shortening this reflection or weaving it into the dinner scene action to maintain momentum while preserving the insights.

issues.description: The Silent Man is referred to as 'Blank' in dialogue but consistently called 'the Silent Man' in narration, which may confuse readers about whether these are the same character.
issues.original_text: The other men were Blank, the Editor aforementioned, a certain journalist, and another—a quiet, shy man with a beard—whom I didn't know
issues.suggestion: Clarify earlier that 'Blank' is a nickname or placeholder name for the Silent Man, or use consistent naming throughout.

pacing.chapter_summary: The chapter opens with the narrator's reflections on the group's skepticism about time travel in the week following the demonstration. At the next Thursday dinner, the Time Traveller arrives late in a disheveled, injured state, refuses to explain immediately, and insists on eating first. After changing clothes and satisfying his hunger, he confirms he has been time traveling and begins to tell his story of an eight-day journey, setting up the main narrative to follow.

conventions_met: Sense of wonder established through the Time Traveller's mysterious return
Foreshadowing of larger adventure through his physical condition
Magic system constraints shown through physical toll of time travel
Protagonist's quest confirmed through his journey
conventions_missed: Limited world-building details woven into action
Minimal hints at larger conflicts or threats beyond personal adventure
